hero.subtitle: Manask is a web-based task management app structured around Folder → Project → Task, with an integrated Pomodoro timer and detailed performance statistics — helping you work more organized every day.

problem.title: Why Manask?
problem.desc: Students, office workers, and freelancers all face the same unsolved problem.

card1.title: Scattered lists, no structure
card1.desc: Paper notes, simple to-do apps, or phone notes aren't enough as tasks pile up. Everything gets mixed together, hard to categorize, and easy to miss.

card2.title: No idea what to prioritize
card2.desc: When every task looks equally important, users easily fall into being busy but unproductive — doing a lot but finishing little.

card3.title: Fragmented tools, too many apps
card3.desc: To-do list in one place, Pomodoro timer elsewhere, habit tracker somewhere else. Switching between apps breaks focus and wastes time.

mission.title: Manask was built to solve that
mission.desc1: Instead of a flat list, Manask lets you organize work in 3 clear tiers: Folder → Project → Task. Each task comes with full attributes: priority level, start date, due date, notes, and time spent.
mission.desc2: The Pomodoro technique is built directly into the workflow — no need to switch apps, just pick the task you're working on and start focusing.
mission.desc3: All activity is recorded and displayed through a visual statistics system: heatmap, line chart, donut chart — helping you review and improve your performance over time.

features.title: Everything you need in one place
features.desc: No need for 3 separate apps. Manask unifies task organization, focus, and statistics into a single interface.

f1.title: Folder → Project → Task
f1.desc: A 3-tier structure gives every task a clear place. Folders group major projects, Projects manage each goal, Tasks are the specific things to do.

f2.title: Detailed task attributes
f2.desc: Each task has: priority level (High / Medium / Low), start date, due date, notes, and time spent — enough to accurately assess real effort.

f3.title: Integrated Pomodoro
f3.desc: Pick the task you're working on, start the timer, focus. Customize Focus, Short Break, and Long Break durations. No app switching — everything is right in Manask.

f4.title: Visual statistics
f4.desc: 365-day activity heatmap, project distribution donut chart, trend line chart for 7 days / 30 days / 12 months. Review your performance and adjust your plan.

f5.title: Personal account
f5.desc: Sign up, log in, and store all your data securely. Every folder, project, and task is synced individually per account.

f6.title: Lightweight & No install
f6.desc: A web app that runs directly in the browser — no installation needed. Dark mode by default, fully responsive — works on any device.

how.title: Get started in just 4 steps
how.desc: No lengthy tutorials needed. Manask is designed so anyone can use it right away.

step1.title: Create Folders & Projects
step1.desc: Create Folders to group related projects (e.g. "Semester 2", "Work"). Inside, create Projects for each specific goal.

step2.title: Add detailed Tasks
step2.desc: Create tasks with a name, priority, start date, due date, and notes. Everything is organized clearly with no overlap.

step3.title: Start Pomodoro & work
step3.desc: Select the task you're working on, start the timer, and focus in cycles. Take short breaks between sessions to maintain energy.

step4.title: Review stats & improve
step4.desc: Look back at your activity heatmap, trend charts, and streak. Understand your work habits and adjust your weekly/monthly plan.

screens.title: Designed to be easy to use
screens.desc: Dark mode, fully responsive — every screen is optimized for the best user experience.

team.title: The people behind Manask
team.desc: Team 2T - Plain Sailing, two students with one goal: making task management truly organized.

member1.name: Nguyễn Mạnh Hùng
member1.bio: Responsible for designing and building the entire user interface — from layout and animations to smooth interactive experiences.

member2.name: Nguyễn Phú Bình
member2.bio: Builds the server system, RESTful API, and database — ensuring every feature runs stably, securely, and efficiently.

competition.title: AI Young Guru by FPT
competition.quote: "We joined AI Young Guru not just to compete, but to prove that a simple, well-organized task management tool truly makes a difference in daily productivity."

footer.builtFor: Built for AI Young Guru · FPT
